# JOHN(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  john — John the Ripper password cracker

## SYNOPSIS
  john [options] [hashfile]

## DESCRIPTION
Cracks password hashes using dictionary attacks, brute force, and rule-based methods.
Requires root access to read /etc/shadow.

## EXAMPLES
  john /etc/shadow
  john --wordlist=rockyou.txt shadow.txt

## NOTES
  Requires: root shell (use GTFOBins exploit first)

## SEE ALSO
  hashcat, hydra, sudo
